UPDATE public.questions SET
  stimulus_text = 'The author of the passage suggests that the most common response to a stressful situation is to avoid it. This is because people often feel overwhelmed by stress and feel that they have no control over it. The author also suggests that people often believe that stress is something that they have to overcome on their own and that it is a sign of weakness to ask for help. The author argues that these beliefs are incorrect and that there are many things that people can do to manage stress effectively. What is the author’s main point in the passage?',
  question_text = 'Which choice best summarizes the author’s main point in the passage?',
  stimulus_type = NULL,

Re-read the sentences surrounding the key detail before eliminating this option on test day."}]'::jsonb,
  correct_answer = 'B',
  explanation = 'The main point of the passage is that people should not be afraid to ask for help when they are feeling stressed. The author argues that people often feel overwhelmed by stress and believe that they have to overcome it on their own. The author suggests that this is incorrect and that there are many things that people can do to manage stress effectively. The author does not suggest that people should avoid stress at all costs, focus on overcoming stress rather than avoiding it, or that stress is a normal part of life and should not be avoided. The passage states that "The author of the passage suggests that the most common response to a stressful situation is to avoid it. UPDATE public.questions SET
  stimulus_text = 'The author argues that the current system of higher education in the United States is flawed. One of the main flaws, the author argues, is that colleges and universities often fail to adequately prepare students for the challenges of the real world. To support this argument, the author cites several examples of students who have graduated from college with high GPAs but have struggled to find jobs or to succeed in their careers. The author concludes by suggesting that colleges and universities need to do a better job of preparing students for the challenges they will face after graduation. What is the most likely reason why the author uses these examples of students who have struggled to find jobs or to succeed in their careers?',
  question_text = 'The author most likely cites these examples of students who have struggled to find jobs or to succeed in their careers to',
  stimulus_type = NULL,
  options = '[{"id":"A","text":"highlight the importance of a strong work ethic for success in the real world.","is_correct":false,"explanation":"Choice A is incorrect because it either misreads the passage, overgeneralizes a limited detail, or focuses on information irrelevant to the question stem. Re-read the sentences surrounding the key detail before eliminating this option on test day."},{"id":"B","text":"demonstrate the need for colleges and universities to provide more hands-on learning experiences.","is_correct":false,"explanation":"Choice B is incorrect because it either misreads the passage, overgeneralizes a limited detail, or focuses on information irrelevant to the question stem. Re-read the sentences surrounding the key detail before eliminating this option on test day."},{"id":"C","text":"illustrate the challenges that many college graduates face in the job market.","is_correct":false,"explanation":"Choice C is incorrect because it either misreads the passage, overgeneralizes a limited detail, or focuses on information irrelevant to the question stem. Re-read the sentences surrounding the key detail before eliminating this option on test day."},{"id":"D","text":"show that a college degree is not always a guarantee of success.","is_correct":true,"explanation":"Choice D matches the question''s requirement and is consistent with the passage''s central claim or supporting detail. Re-read the sentences surrounding the key detail before eliminating this option on test day."}]'::jsonb,
  correct_answer = 'D',
